properties.name: Epoch 1 · Recorded flight path (ADS-B)
properties.desc: Civil secondary-radar/ADS-B positions from takeoff at Kuala Lumpur (00:42 UTC+8) to the final transponder return near waypoint IGARI (01:21:13 UTC+8). Compiled from report-quoted positions and the filed route; the authoritative track is in the SIR 2018 / Factual Information 2015 appendix figures.

citation.label: Malaysian Safety Investigation Report (2018); Factual Information (2015)

points.label: Cleared to push back, gate C1 WMKK (airport reference point)
points.source: time: FI p1 via Gilbert PDF; position: OurAirports WMKK

points.label: Takeoff from runway 32R (threshold coordinates, field elev ~70 ft)
points.source: time: FI p1 via Gilbert PDF; position: OurAirports runways.csv WMKK 32R threshold

points.label: Climbing right turn to the northeast (cleared FL180 direct IGARI at 00:43 (UTC+8))
Near filed waypoint PIBOS, climbing (cleared FL350 at 00:50 (UTC+8))
points.source: position: FI filed flight plan (PIBOS N0320.5 E10203.1) via mh370wiki.net; time interpolated

points.label: Crew reports maintaining FL350
points.source: time/alt: FI App 1.18E via Gilbert PDF; position interpolated

points.label: Last ACARS transmission (HDG 027, FL350, Mach 0.821)
points.source: time/alt/hdg: FI p46 via Gilbert PDF; position interpolated

points.label: Near filed waypoint IKUKO
points.source: position: FI filed flight plan (IKUKO N0545.2 E10313.4) via mh370wiki.net; time interpolated

points.label: Final voice transmission: 'Good night, Malaysian three seven zero'
points.source: time: FI App 1.18E via Gilbert PDF; position interpolated

points.label: Passing waypoint IGARI (6°56'12"N 103°35'06"E)
points.source: time: FI p2 via Gilbert PDF; position: Wikipedia MH370 article, cross-checked with FI flight plan table (N0656.2 E10335.1) via mh370wiki.net

points.label: Last actual SSR return (Kota Bharu radar head, Mode A 2157, callsign MAS370); the KL ACC display symbol persisted another ~30 s
points.source: ATC-Caption-2025 KB_SSR_MH370.csv final return 17:20:42.30 (computed lat/lon from raw rho/theta); Kuantan SSR last return 17:20:31.51 at 6.937599N 103.567123E corroborates

points.label: SSR position symbol dropped off KL ATCC display, 3.2 NM past IGARI (Mode S symbol lost 01:20:36 (UTC+8))
points.source: time + '3.2 nm after passing IGARI': SIR Table 2.2C p.344 / FI p2; position interpolated (dead-reckoned ~42 s past IGARI on 059° toward BITOD; official reports publish no coordinate for this event)
